title: Broken Harness
text: Your body learned the wrong way to absorb a crushing hit.
flavor: Every brace and buckle now fits around remembered pain.
trigger: The first wound you take from an enemy each session.
penalty: Gain 1 Heat as the harness locks and vents wrong.
relief: Break or discard armor to cancel this scar's effect for the wound that triggered it.
upside: If the enemy is defeated later in the same turn, gain 1 trophy.
